apiErrors.FORBIDDEN: You are not allowed to do this.
apiErrors.BANNED: Your account has been suspended. Contact the helpline for assistance.
apiErrors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Some information is invalid. Please check and try again.
apiErrors.CONFLICT: This action conflicts with the current state.
apiErrors.STATE_INVALID: This action is not possible in the current state.
apiErrors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please try again in a little while.
apiErrors.INTERNAL: Something went wrong. Please try again.
apiErrors.USER_BANNED: Your account has been suspended. Contact the helpline for assistance.
apiErrors.LISTING_LIMIT_REACHED: You already have 10 active listings. Mark one sold or archive it first.
apiErrors.PHOTO_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: A maximum of 5 photos can be attached.
apiErrors.FAVORITE_LIMIT_REACHED: A maximum of 200 listings can be saved.
apiErrors.INVALID_STATE_TRANSITION: This action is not possible in the listing's current state.
apiErrors.EDIT_NOT_ALLOWED: This listing can no longer be edited.
apiErrors.DECLARATION_REQUIRED: Please accept the seller declaration to submit the listing.
apiErrors.PHONE_IN_DESCRIPTION: Do not write phone numbers in the description. Buyers will contact you through the app.
apiErrors.INVALID_UPLOAD: This photo could not be used. Only JPG, PNG or WebP up to 5 MB is allowed.
apiErrors.REPORT_ALREADY_EXISTS: You have already reported this listing.
